message:
feat(test): add comprehensive test infrastructure with custom matchers

Establishes robust testing infrastructure for /tldr page tests with
structured logging, mock data factories, and custom Vitest matchers.

## New File: tests/utils/tldr-test-helpers.ts

### Logging Utilities
- Structured logging with levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, SILENT
- setLogLevel() and getLogLevel() for controlling verbosity
- testLog.timing() for performance measurement
- testLog.dom() for debugging rendered output
- testLog.section(), testLog.testStart(), testLog.testEnd() for test organization

### Mock Data Factories
- createMockTool(overrides?) - Creates valid TldrFlywheelTool with defaults
- createMockTools(count, categoryDistribution?) - Batch creation
- createMockToolsWithSynergies(count) - Interconnected tools for synergy testing
- resetMockIdCounter() - Reset for consistent test IDs

### Render Utilities
- renderWithLogging() - Enhanced render with timing and DOM logging
- waitForAnimation() - Wait for Framer Motion animations
- waitForAnimationFrame() - RAF-based waiting

### Accessibility Utilities
- hasAccessibleName() - Check for aria-label, text content, title
- getFocusableElements() - Query all focusable elements
- meetsTouchTargetSize() - WCAG 2.5.5 compliance check
- mockReducedMotion() - Control prefers-reduced-motion mock

### Custom Matchers
- toBeAccessible() - Verify element has proper ARIA attributes
- toMeetTouchTargetSize(minSize?) - Check touch target dimensions
- toHaveValidSynergies(allTools) - Validate synergy references

## Enhanced vitest.setup.tsx

### Additions
- Import and register custom matchers with expect.extend()
- beforeAll/afterAll lifecycle logging for test suite visibility
- beforeEach reset of mock ID counter for test isolation
- TypeScript declarations for custom matcher types

### Existing Mocks (preserved)
- next/navigation (useRouter, usePathname, useSearchParams)
- next/image (renders as standard img)
- framer-motion (useReducedMotion returns true)
- matchMedia, ResizeObserver, IntersectionObserver

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
